{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Investment Manager",
  "description": "BeaconGate Limited is one of the leading business solution provider companies in Nigeria, thus offering a wide range of human resource support services to many business organizations.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Investment Manager

Job Location:&nbsp;Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time
Job Grade: Senior Management

Job Summary


	Responsible for developing and executing investment strategies, managing portfolios, conducting financial analysis, and identifying investment opportunities that optimize returns while maintaining acceptable risk levels.


Key Responsibilities


	Develop and implement investment strategies aligned with portfolio objectives and risk appetite.
	Conduct financial modelling, valuation, and investment analysis across asset classes.
	Monitor portfolio performance and recommend adjustments to improve returns.
	Perform market research and economic analysis to guide investment decisions.
	Conduct due diligence on equities, fixed income, and alternative investments.
	Prepare investment reports, performance updates, and presentations for management and clients.
	Participate in investment committee meetings and present investment recommendations.
	Ensure investment activities comply with regulatory requirements and internal policies.
	Monitor macroeconomic trends, industry developments, and financial markets.
	Support business development by providing insights during client engagements.


Key Performance Indicators (KPIs)


	Portfolio return relative to the benchmark
	Risk-adjusted return metrics
	Quality of investment recommendations
	Timeliness and accuracy of investment reports
	Compliance with regulatory and internal investment guidelines


Qualifications


	Bachelor&rsquo;s Degree in Finance, Economics, Accounting, or related field.
	MBA or any Master&#39;s Degree is Mandatory.
	Professional certifications such as CFA, CIS, and CAIA are strongly preferred.


Experience Required:


	7&nbsp;&ndash; 10 years of experience in investment management, portfolio management, or financial analysis.


Key Competencies:


	Investment strategy development
	Financial modelling and valuation
	Risk analysis
	Decision making and analytical thinking
	Stakeholder communication and presentation.


Salary Range
N1,300,000 - N1,500,000 per month.

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CVs to:&nbsp;beacongatejobportal@gmail.com&nbsp;using &quot;Investment Manager &quot;as the subject of the email.",

Investment Manager Job at BeaconGate Limited




        
    

        
        BeaconGate Limited is one of the leading business solution provider companies in Nigeria, thus offering a wide range of human resource support services to many business organizations.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Investment Manager

Job Location: Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time
Job Grade: Senior Management

Job Summary


	Responsible for developing and executing investment strategies, managing portfolios, conducting financial analysis, and identifying investment opportunities that optimize returns while maintaining acceptable risk levels.


Key Responsibilities
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Develop and implement investment strategies aligned with portfolio objectives and risk appetite.
	Conduct financial modelling, valuation, and investment analysis across asset classes.
	Monitor portfolio performance and recommend adjustments to improve returns.
	Perform market research and economic analysis to guide investment decisions.
	Conduct due diligence on equities, fixed income, and alternative investments.
	Prepare investment reports, performance updates, and presentations for management and clients.
	Participate in investment committee meetings and present investment recommendations.
	Ensure investment activities comply with regulatory requirements and internal policies.
	Monitor macroeconomic trends, industry developments, and financial markets.
	Support business development by providing insights during client engagements.


Key Performance Indicators (KPIs)


	Portfolio return relative to the benchmark
	Risk-adjusted return metrics
	Quality of investment recommendations
	Timeliness and accuracy of investment reports
	Compliance with regulatory and internal investment guidelines


Qualifications


	Bachelor’s Degree in Finance, Economics, Accounting, or related field.
	MBA or any Master's Degree is Mandatory.
	Professional certifications such as CFA, CIS, and CAIA are strongly preferred.


Experience Required:


	7 – 10 years of experience in investment management, portfolio management, or financial analysis.


Key Competencies:


	Investment strategy development
	Financial modelling and valuation
	Risk analysis
	Decision making and analytical thinking
	Stakeholder communication and presentation.


Salary Range
N1,300,000 - N1,500,000 per month.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CVs to: [email protected] using "Investment Manager "as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "HR Officer",
  "description": "PrimoFinesse, a management consulting, as well as an Academy, is&nbsp;recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: HR Officer

Job Location:&nbsp;Surulere, Lagos
Employment Type: Contract (1 year)
Work Mode: On-site
Work Days: Mondays - Fridays
Work Hours: 8:00am - 5:00pm

Job Overview


	We are seeking a highly motivated and proactive HR Officer to join our Human Resources team.
	The HR Officer will support core HR functions including recruitment, employee engagement, performance management, learning and development, payroll, and HR administration.
	This role is ideal for a professional with hands-on HR experience who thrives in a fast-paced and dynamic work environment.


Job Responsibilities


	Draft and post job advertisements across relevant platforms.
	Screen resumes and shortlist candidates for interviews.
	Schedule interviews and coordinate with candidates and hiring managers.
	Maintain positive employee relations through surveys and feedback mechanisms.
	Assist in payroll processing and related documentation.
	Support the management of employee compensation and benefits.
	Maintain accurate employee records and HR databases.
	Provide administrative support to the HR team as required.
	Ensure compliance with HR policies, procedures, and labor regulations.
	Manage employee benefits and compensation records.


Qualifications and Skills
Education:


	Bachelor&rsquo;s Degree in Human Resources, Business Administration, Psychology, or a related field.


Experience:


	Minimum of 1 year of experience in an HR role or related field.


Skills:


	Strong verbal and written communication skills.
	Proficiency in Microsoft Office (Word, Excel, PowerPoint).
	Good organizational and time management skills.
	Ability to handle confidential information with discretion.
	Strong interpersonal and problem-solving skills.


Location Requirement:


	Candidates must reside within Surulere, Ilupeju, Yaba, Ketu, Ojota, Shomolu, Bariga, or surrounding areas.


Benefits


	Salary: N150,000 net
	13th Month salary
	HMO
	Call Allowance.


Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CVs to:&nbsp;primofinessejobs@gmail.com&nbsp;using&nbsp;&ldquo;HR Officer&rdquo; as the subject of the email.

Note: Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.",

HR Officer Job at PrimoFinesse




        
    

        
        PrimoFinesse, a management consulting, as well as an Academy, is recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: HR Officer

Job Location: Surulere, Lagos
Employment Type: Contract (1 year)
Work Mode: On-site
Work Days: Mondays - Fridays
Work Hours: 8:00am - 5:00pm

Job Overview
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	We are seeking a highly motivated and proactive HR Officer to join our Human Resources team.
	The HR Officer will support core HR functions including recruitment, employee engagement, performance management, learning and development, payroll, and HR administration.
	This role is ideal for a professional with hands-on HR experience who thrives in a fast-paced and dynamic work environment.


Job Responsibilities


	Draft and post job advertisements across relevant platforms.
	Screen resumes and shortlist candidates for interviews.
	Schedule interviews and coordinate with candidates and hiring managers.
	Maintain positive employee relations through surveys and feedback mechanisms.
	Assist in payroll processing and related documentation.
	Support the management of employee compensation and benefits.
	Maintain accurate employee records and HR databases.
	Provide administrative support to the HR team as required.
	Ensure compliance with HR policies, procedures, and labor regulations.
	Manage employee benefits and compensation records.


Qualifications and Skills
Education:


	Bachelor’s Degree in Human Resources, Business Administration, Psychology, or a related field.


Experience:


	Minimum of 1 year of experience in an HR role or related field.


Skills:


	Strong verbal and written communication skills.
	Proficiency in Microsoft Office (Word, Excel, PowerPoint).
	Good organizational and time management skills.
	Ability to handle confidential information with discretion.
	Strong interpersonal and problem-solving skills.


Location Requirement:


	Candidates must reside within Surulere, Ilupeju, Yaba, Ketu, Ojota, Shomolu, Bariga, or surrounding areas.


Benefits


	Salary: N150,000 net
	13th Month salary
	HMO
	Call Allowance.


Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CVs to: [email protected] using “HR Officer” as the subject of the email.

Note: Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.    

    

        Click here to Apply

title: Logistics Coordinator (International Logistics Experience) Job at Future Moves Recruitment Agency Limited
content:
Future Moves Recruitment Agency Limited (FMR Agency) - Our client, a Logistics Service Company, is recruiting to fill the position below: 

Job Position: Logistics Coordinator (International Logistics Experience)

Job Location: Lagos
Employment Type:  Full-Time
Industry: Logistics Service Company

Job Summary
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	The Logistics Coordinator manages the day-to-day movement of shipments across the organization network.
	The role ensures that every shipment is properly validated, routed, compliant, handed over correctly to carrier partners, and successfully placed in transit.
	You will coordinate exports, imports, cargo, carrier pickups, warehouse handling, and operational documentation to ensure smooth logistics execution.


Key Responsibilities


	Plan and assign shipments to the appropriate carriers based on destination, service type, and timelines.
	Coordinate export and import operations to ensure smooth cross-border movement.
	Review and validate shipment details to ensure compliance with customs and carrier regulations.
	Supervise warehouse handling, including packaging, labeling, and sorting of shipments.
	Manage daily pickup and drop-off schedules with carriers and delivery drivers.
	Maintain accurate shipment documentation and ensure proper record-keeping.
	Liaise with finance and carrier partners to confirm payments and avoid dispatch delays.
	Oversee cargo consolidation, documentation, and tracking of shipments in transit.


Requirements


	4 years of logistics or operations coordination experience in a logistics service providing company.
	International logistics/shipping experience.
	Strong understanding of international shipping processes.
	Experience working with multiple carriers.
	High attention to detail.
	Strong organizational ability.
	Ability to manage multiple shipments simultaneously.
	Freight forwarding experience.
	Customs clearance exposure.
	Cargo consolidation experience.
	Operations dashboard or logistics software experience.


Salary
N150,000 - N200,000 monthly. 

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified  candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.    

    

        Click here to Apply

	Evaluate and process loan applications

	Follow up on overdue payments and drive recovery

	Basic Knowledge in accounting, finance and mathematics
	Previous work Experience or training in sales (Preferred).

N130,000 monthly.

Credit Officer Job at Fort Knox Outsourcing




        
    

        
        Fort Knox Outsourcing is poised to serve the growing need of businesses in Nigeria By helping them to reap the economic, strategic and operational benefits offered by outsourcing. We act as a “Third Party Service Provider” that Source, Select, and Second employment ready workforce in line with client specifications to meet their talent needs as quickly as possible!

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Credit Officer
Job Location: Kuje, Abuja (FCT)
Employment Type: Full-time

Key Responsibilities
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Evaluate and process loan applications
	Conduct field verification of clients and businesses
	Assess creditworthiness and risk level
	Disburse loans and monitor repayments
	Follow up on overdue payments and drive recovery
	Maintain accurate credit records and reports
	Build and sustain strong customer relationships
	Ensure compliance with company policies


Requirements


	B.Sc /HND /OND at the minimum.
	Minimum 2 – 3 years of experience in SME Loan or Merchant Lending
	Basic Knowledge in accounting, finance and mathematics
	Previous work Experience or training in sales (Preferred).


Salary
N130,000 monthly.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position and location as subject of the mail.

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Fiber Field Engineer (FSE)",
  "description": "At Victoria Waterfront Hotel &amp; Resorts, we believe in creating an oasis of comfort and sophistication along the picturesque coast of Lagos. Our mission is to offer exceptional hospitality through a combination of modern amenities, impeccable service, and personalized experiences. Whether you&rsquo;re visiting for business or leisure, our dedicated team is on hand to ensure your every need is met&mdash;so you can fully immerse yourself in the serenity and energy of our waterfront setting.

Beyond providing stylish accommodations, we celebrate the vibrant local culture through events, dining experiences, and thoughtful guest activities. Join us and discover the perfect blend of relaxation, adventure, and authentic Lagos charm.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Fiber Field Engineer (FSE)

Job Location:&nbsp;Ikeja, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time
Department: Engineering / Telecommunications

Job Purpose


	The Fiber Field Engineer oversees the installation, testing, and maintenance of fiber optic cabling and equipment.
	This role involves a mix of high-level technical troubleshooting, physical site surveys, and managing field crews to ensure that network expansions are executed on time and meet strict performance standards.


Key Responsibilities


	Site Surveys &amp; Planning
	Testing &amp; Quality Assurance
	Construction &amp; Maintenance Oversight.
	Documentation &amp; Reporting.


Required Skills &amp; Qualifications


	Education: OND / HND / Bachelor&rsquo;s Degree in Telecommunications, Electrical Engineering, Computer Science or a related field.


Salary
N200,000 monthly.

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;recruitment.communication1@gmail.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.",

  "validThrough": "2026-05-15",

    "@type": "Organization",
    "name": "Victoria Waterfront Hotel & Resorts"
    
  },

      "@type": "PostalAddress",

      "addressCountry": "NG"

  },

Fiber Field Engineer (FSE) Job at Victoria Waterfront Hotel & Resorts




        
    

        
        At Victoria Waterfront Hotel & Resorts, we believe in creating an oasis of comfort and sophistication along the picturesque coast of Lagos. Our mission is to offer exceptional hospitality through a combination of modern amenities, impeccable service, and personalized experiences. Whether you’re visiting for business or leisure, our dedicated team is on hand to ensure your every need is met—so you can fully immerse yourself in the serenity and energy of our waterfront setting.

Beyond providing stylish accommodations, we celebrate the vibrant local culture through events, dining experiences, and thoughtful guest activities. Join us and discover the perfect blend of relaxation, adventure, and authentic Lagos charm.
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    



We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Fiber Field Engineer (FSE)

Job Location: Ikeja, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time
Department: Engineering / Telecommunications

Job Purpose


	The Fiber Field Engineer oversees the installation, testing, and maintenance of fiber optic cabling and equipment.
	This role involves a mix of high-level technical troubleshooting, physical site surveys, and managing field crews to ensure that network expansions are executed on time and meet strict performance standards.


Key Responsibilities


	Site Surveys & Planning
	Testing & Quality Assurance
	Construction & Maintenance Oversight.
	Documentation & Reporting.


Required Skills & Qualifications


	Education: OND / HND / Bachelor’s Degree in Telecommunications, Electrical Engineering, Computer Science or a related field.


Salary
N200,000 monthly.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.    

    

        Click here to Apply
